title: Goozy Grape Nosh
description: A citrusy, gooey Canadian dish featuring grape nut cereal, whipped coconut cream, and a touch of honey for a delightful snack or dessert.
instructions: Toast the Grape Nuts in a dry skillet until golden, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
In a separate bowl, whip the Coconut Whipped Cream until stiff peaks form.
Stir together the toasted Grape Nuts with a bit of honey and lemon zest until well combined.
Fold in the whipped Coconut Whipped Cream gently.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves if desired and serve immediately while warm.
